Fulcra Collect

Pair Fulcra Attention extension

Click below. If the extension is installed in this browser, it'll receive a token from the daemon and store it in chrome.storage.local.

Idle — click Pair to start.
Back to app

No ack from the extension within 3 s. Either it's not installed, or its content script didn't run on this page (try a hard refresh). You can paste the token manually into the extension's Options page:
